---
name: Token Request
about: Request a token addition
title: 'Add {TOKEN_SYMBOL}: {TOKEN_NAME}'
labels: token request
assignees: ''
---

> **Prefer to open a pull request?** PRs are reviewed faster than issues. See the [README](../../README.md#adding-a-token) for the full PR guide.

- [ ] I understand that token listing is not required to use the Kumbaya Interface with a token.
- [ ] I understand that filing an issue does not guarantee addition to the Kumbaya default token list.
- [ ] I will not ping the team about this listing request.

## Token information

**Chain ID:** <!-- 4326 for MegaETH Mainnet, 6343 for MegaETH Testnet -->
**Token Address (checksummed):**
**Token Name (from contract):**
**Token Symbol (from contract):**
**Token Decimals (from contract):**
**Liquidity Pool Address:**

## Project links

**Official website:**
**Block explorer (verified contract) link:**
**CoinMarketCap or CoinGecko page (if listed):**
**Social channels (Twitter/X, Discord, Telegram, etc.):**

## Logo

Attach the token logo to this issue. It must be **one** of:

- [ ] **PNG** at exactly **500x500 px** (transparent background preferred)
- [ ] **SVG** (square viewBox, no embedded raster images)

The filename should be the **checksummed contract address** (e.g. `0x021ee124cF23D302A7f725AE7a01B77A8ce9782B.png`).

## Confirmations

- [ ] The contract source is verified on the block explorer.
- [ ] The name and symbol do not impersonate any existing token or project.
- [ ] The contract uses a standard ERC-20 implementation, or any non-standard behaviour (transfer hooks, blacklists, mint authority, fees on transfer, etc.) is disclosed below.
- [ ] I have the right to distribute the attached logo.

**Non-standard behaviour to disclose (if any):**
